Knobbed Warclub  
 

Lore Item Placeable
Slot: PRIMARY SECONDARY
Skill: 1H Blunt Atk Delay: 24
DMG: 8 Dmg Bonus: 35
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.
WIS: +3
WT: 2.0 Size: MEDIUM
Class: ALL except NEC WIZ MAG ENC BER
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 4 (Weapon: General)
Slot 2, Type 20 (Ornamentation)
Knobbed Warclub
Lore Item Placeable
Slot: PRIMARY SECONDARY
Skill: 1H Blunt Atk Delay: 24
DMG: 8 Dmg Bonus: 35
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.
WIS: +3
WT: 2.0 Size: MEDIUM
Class: ALL except NEC WIZ MAG ENC BER
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 4 (Weapon: General)
Slot 2, Type 20 (Ornamentation)

Item Type:1H Blunt
Stackable:No
Merchant Value:4 pp 8 gp 0 sp 0 cp
Tribute:54
Submitted By:Doromir
Lucy Entry By:Kerasota
Item Updated By:SwiftyMUSE
Source:Live
IC Last Updated:2021-12-11 10:18:20
Page Updated:Thu Oct 9th, 2008

Expansion: Ruins of Kunark
Average Price: 229pp Pricing Data...
Rarity: Uncommon
Level to Attain: 40
[Drops | Comments ]

Drops

This item is found on creatures.

Trakanon's Teeth
NPC Name
Champion Arlek


Zone(s) Found In:


Zone Name
Trakanon's Teeth


Uploaded December 8th, 2018 by Drewinette
Send a correction
Post Comment
Knobbed Warclub
QuoteReply
# Oct 02 2016 at 12:40 PM Rating: Excellent
snailish
4,580 posts
Any modern verification that this still drops off Champion Arlek and that he is on the "Forager Cycle" --Note that many believe the forager cycle was altered for one of the progression servers a few years back (and thus all live servers as well) and getting keyed for Old Sebilis is waaaay easier than it used to be. However, does this mean more Champion Arlek's (or less or no change)?

We need modern item UI pic of this item.

We could use a shot of someone wielding this item.
▲ Page top
Nice Weapon
QuoteReply
# May 09 2003 at 7:33 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1701044181950
10 posts
I just picked up one of these in the bazaar on Emarr server for 50pp. It's a decent 1hb for monks. Low weight, good dam/del. I'm happy with it.
▲ Page top
More Vendor Luck
QuoteReply
# Oct 02 2002 at 9:13 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1676852283084
74 posts
I can beat the 109pp for this item. I just got one for 75pp from a trader in the Bazaar. Rare to find an underpriced item for sale in the Bazaar, I tend find a lot of lvl 1 characters there asking ridiculous prices for items. No wonder they don't sell anything.
▲ Page top
Beastlords Can use too
QuoteReply
# Dec 20 2001 at 1:57 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592757281072
View User Forum
44 posts
This is also useable by BST/ALL. - Good Weapon +WIS Secondary Equipable low weight - swing it all day - Faster than the claws and better ratio.
▲ Page top
A Lucky Vendor Stop
QuoteReply
# Dec 11 2001 at 12:57 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591770819429
View User Forum
5 posts
I bought this club off the vendor outside the bank in Kelethin for, hehe, 109pp. Thank you whoever sold it to him!

Fernis
Zebuxoruk
▲ Page top
Drop Info
QuoteReply
# Oct 15 2001 at 1:20 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591761453921
Scholar
45 posts
This item drops off of Champion Arlek in Trak's Teeth. Arlek is an Iskar Ghost Warrior, and most often spawns as a level 50. He spawns on the Forger cycle - kill enough Foragers and he will eventually pop. Nothing unusual about fighting him - pretty much straight smash and bash.
▲ Page top
Primary and secondary
QuoteReply
# Jun 05 2001 at 7:44 AM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
Actually this is not bad for true meleers either, since it can be used in the secondary slot as well as the primary... 8 24 is not that bad melee stats, esp. rangers should be interested considering the wis bonus...
▲ Page top
Falinal
QuoteReply
# Jun 04 2001 at 11:19 PM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
This is a great club and i use it all the time and i will probably save it and pass it down later
▲ Page top
i got it for free and no time trying for it!!!!!
QuoteReply
# Jun 01 2001 at 2:38 AM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
I love this club its nice for lower lvl druids like myself it was a gift to me from a higher lvl druid and i enjoy it greatly. i hit for about 20dam max wich is nice while i still melee (in wolf form). its nice untill u can go get nicer items and not realy for good use of a lvl 40. if ya get it id sell it or give it away to newbs or perhaps another char. Its great for younger lvls that are wis based and still need to melee!!!

Alemplo Invictus
26lvl druid of tunare
